modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to open email attachment from a co-worker in Outlook.

full_description_text:  
So, I was just trying to open an email attachment that my co-worker sent me, right? But for some reason, it just wouldn’t open at all in Outlook. I clicked on it a few times, and nothing happened, which was really frustrating because I needed that file for my work. It’s Office 2013, and I thought everything was supposed to work smoothly, but here I am, stuck without the attachment!
short_description: Unable to open email attachment from a co-worker in Outlook.
